title: ComfyUI Tutorial Series Ep 30: Game Design with AI and Photoshop
description:
In this episode, learn how to create stunning game assets for a Match-3 style game using ComfyUI, Photoshop, and other tools! We’ll design an Ancient Egyptian-themed UI, including icons, tiles, buttons, and backgrounds, combining AI workflows with Photoshop adjustments for a polished finish.

📌 What’s Covered:

- Creating and refining game assets with ComfyUI and ControlNet.
- Enhancing designs in Photoshop, from fonts to color matching.
- Exporting and organizing icons, buttons, and tiles for your game.
- Animating mockups in CapCut for gameplay previews.
- Tips for logo design, font selection, and creating cohesive themes.

🔧 Tools Used:

- ComfyUI (with ControlNet & Flux dev).
- Photoshop (for editing and exporting assets).
- CapCut (for game mockup animations).

Get the workflows and instructions from discord
https://discord.gg/gggpkVgBf3

Check Other Episodes
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL-pohOSaL8P9kLZP8tQ1K1QWdZEgwiBM0

Unlock exclusive perks by joining our channel:
ht
